note: Field Group has no standalone settings route and mutates only display config via core Field UI, so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe field_group-specific facts (the FieldGroupFormatter plugin type, third-party-settings storage, built-in format types, and the render/alter hooks) an agent would otherwise read source to answer.

evals.prompt: In a Drupal 11 module I want to define a brand-new field_group format (a custom way to render a group of fields). What plugin type do I create, which base class do I extend, and in what namespace/directory does the plugin class live? Name them.
evals.expected_output: Create a FieldGroupFormatter plugin: class in Drupal\<module>\Plugin\field_group\FieldGroupFormatter, annotated @FieldGroupFormatter, extending Drupal\field_group\FieldGroupFormatterBase (interface FieldGroupFormatterInterface).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal site, where/how does field_group store the groups a site builder creates on Manage form display / Manage display? Is there a separate config or content entity per group? Explain so I know how to export them.
evals.expected_output: Groups are stored as third-party settings on the entity form/view display config entity (e.g. core.entity_form_display.<entity>.<bundle>.<mode>.third_party.field_group.<group_name>), not a separate entity, so they export/deploy with drush config:export like any other config.

evals.prompt: A site builder asks which built-in group format types field_group ships for organizing fields on a form. List the core formats (with their machine ids) available in the Add group dropdown.
evals.expected_output: Built-in FieldGroupFormatter formats: Fieldset (fieldset), Details (details), Details sidebar (details_sidebar), Tab (tab), Tabs (tabs), HTML element (html_element); Accordion (accordion/accordion_item) comes from the deprecated field_group_accordion submodule.

evals.prompt: I'm hand-writing a field_group group into an exported core.entity_form_display YAML config. Under the third_party.field_group.<group> key, which keys describe the group's contents, its format, and its nesting under a parent group?
evals.expected_output: The group defines children (fields/subgroups in it), label, parent_name (name of parent group for nesting), region, weight, format_type, and format_settings (keyed by the format's own schema).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal site I want to attach custom classes / JS (#attached, drupalSettings) to one field_group group as it renders on the entity view, without subclassing a formatter. Which field_group hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_field_group_pre_render() (or hook_field_group_pre_render_alter() to tweak after build) — receives &$element, &$group, &$rendering_object; use it to set #attached/drupalSettings, attributes, classes, #weight on the group.

evals.prompt: I need to add conditional #states visibility logic to a whole field_group group on an entity form (not the front-end view). Which field_group hook(s) fire during form processing that I should use?
evals.expected_output: Use the form-processing hooks: hook_field_group_form_process() / hook_field_group_form_process_alter() (per-group, add #states), and hook_field_group_form_process_build_alter() for cross-group form logic after all groups are processed.

evals.prompt: I want to override the Twig template for field_group's HTML element format in my theme, and target one specific group by name. What is the base template name and how does field_group give me a per-group theme suggestion?
evals.expected_output: Override field-group-html-element.html.twig; field_group_theme_suggestions_alter() adds a per-group suggestion so you can create field-group-html-element--<group-name>.html.twig. (Details/Fieldset/Vertical tabs reuse core templates.)
